summary_one_line: Input must contain a chunk whose 4-byte FOURCC name equals the PLTE tag so chunk_name==png_PLTE is true.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A PNG chunk header whose 4-byte type field equals the ASCII FOURCC 'PLTE'; png_read_chunk_header parses this into png_ptr->chunk_name, and the blocker at line 838 compares it against the png_PLTE 32-bit constant.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog resolves the branch in 9/10 trials and hits the true side 12 times (W T=12), meaning its inputs present a chunk-name word equal to the PLTE constant; the CMP interception logs the parsed chunk_name vs png_PLTE comparison and I2SRandReplace splices the constant into the input bytes, and the winning seed's lineage carries I2S-floor dash rows.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive blocks the branch in all 10 trials and never takes the true side (L T=0 at line 838); without I2S it cannot place the exact 4-byte PLTE FOURCC at the chunk-name offset by chance, so the equality compare against png_PLTE stays false.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver entry for the chunk_name==png_PLTE integer compare and substitutes the png_PLTE operand into the input at the offset matching the other operand, manufacturing the exact FOURCC that naive's havoc mutators cannot guess.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the equality test chunk_name == png_PLTE at pngread.c:838, true side globally blocked.
chunk_name is parsed from the chunk header read each loop iteration, establishing it as an input-derived value.
cmplog (winner) takes the PLTE true side while naive (loser) never does at the blocker line.
cmplog resolves the branch in 9 of 10 trials while naive blocks in all 10.
naive loser resolves zero of ten trials at this branch.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace scans the input for a matching operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutator, so it cannot perform input-to-state substitution of the PLTE constant.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3897 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed f675a9b2ee4cf006` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 5 and 6 of the ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current cmplog build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on an exact 4-byte FOURCC equality compare in which cmplog and naive resolve the branch at statistically indistinguishable rates would refute the I2S attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff offsets shown (0x13-0x2e) are in the IHDR region, not the PLTE chunk-name offset, so direct byte-level evidence that I2S placed the literal PLTE FOURCC is inferred rather than visible in the diff.
